member.name: M:HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.Controllers.PeopleController.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all registered people ordered by identifier.

member.name: M:HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.Controllers.PeopleController.CreateAsync(HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.DTOs.Person.CreatePersonRequest)
member.summary: Creates a person with name and age.

member.name: M:HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.Controllers.PeopleController.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a person by id and removes related transactions by cascade delete.

member.name: M:HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.Controllers.SummaryController.GetSummaryAsync
member.summary: Returns financial totals grouped by person and the general household balance.

member.name: M:HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.Controllers.TransactionsController.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all registered transactions including the person's name.

member.name: M:HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.Controllers.TransactionsController.GetTransactionByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a transaction by id including the person's name.

member.name: M:HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.Controllers.TransactionsController.CreateAsync(HouseholdExpenseManager.Api.DTOs.Transaction.CreateTransactionRequest)
member.summary: Creates a transaction for an existing person.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
